intents.text: Make snowflakes smaller and increase their quantity moderately, using your aesthetic judgment.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: 雪花太大了，量太少了，但也别太多，你作为审美专家决定一下

intents.text: Is the snowflake feature Gemini-only, or does it also activate on aistudio and other platforms?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: 这个功能是 Gemini Only 的吗？在 aistudio 和其他平台也会不断检测吗

intents.text: Reference the previous commit that fixed Firefox stuttering on aistudio to avoid similar issues.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: 上一个 commit 修复了在firefox上 aistudio 卡顿的问题，你参考一下

intents.text: Was the Haerbin commit reasonable? Did it actually fix the Firefox performance issue?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Haerbin 这个 commit 是合理的吗？好像确实修复了firefox上的性能问题

intents.text: Add very small snowflakes to the mix.
Increase the variety/richness of snowflake styles.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: 雪花样式的丰富度不够

intents.text: Vary the falling speed of snowflakes for more realism.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: 飘落速度过于单一，缺乏真实感

intents.text: Keep performance overhead minimal — nearly zero impact on resources.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: 不要占用太大资源，尽量做到几乎没有性能影响
